data.description: Starting at 7th level, creatures within 10 feet of you gain benefit. While friendly creatures are within 10 feet of you, they can't be charmed and remain conscious. At higher levels, the radius increases.

Devotion paladins share tenets of oath, though the words and strictures vary. Honesty: Don't lie or cheat; be honest in your promise. Courage: Never fear to act, but use caution wisely. Compassion: Aid and protect the weak and others; show mercy to those who threaten them, but temper it with wisdom. Honor: Treat others with fairness and let your deeds be an example of honor as much as possible, causing least amount of harm. Duty: Be responsible for your actions and care about the consequences; protect those entrusted to you and those under your authority.
Guard nature and its creatures from those who would harm them.
You can use a bonus action to emit an aura of light around yourself. While within this aura, you and your allies within 10 feet have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.
